query_title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie

recommendations.title: Psych 3: This Is Gus
recommendations.overview: In preparation for a shotgun wedding before the birth of Baby Guster, Shawn and Gus go rogue in an attempt to track down Selene’s estranged husband, as Lassiter grapples with the future of his career.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Killing Daddy
recommendations.overview: When Cassie's father finds himself vulnerable and bedridden, she believes she has the perfect revenge for her mother's death.

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: Beckett
recommendations.overview: An American tourist in Greece finds himself on the run after a tragic accident plunges him into a political conspiracy that makes him a target for assassination.

recommendations.title: Psych: The Movie
recommendations.overview: The ambitious friends come together during the holidays after a mystery assailant targets one of their own. A comedic thrill-ride follows, as the wild and unpredictable Psych team pursues the bad guys, justice … and, of course, food!

recommendations.title: Flowers in the Attic
recommendations.overview: After the sudden death of their father, four children face cruel treatment from their ruthless grandmother.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: An Inspector Calls
recommendations.genres: Drama, Crime, Thriller, Mystery, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Northern England, 1912. The dinner of a wealthy family is interrupted by Inspector Goole, who only announces that a young woman has committed suicide. Then, he simply asks everyone present, one by one, if they knew her.

recommendations.title: Cleveland Abduction
recommendations.overview: A single mother becomes Ariel Castro's first kidnapping victim, and finds herself trapped in his home with two other women for 11 years.
